checks.msg: PASS: function_length — every function over 80 lines is baselined at or below its recorded length
PASS: module_budget — every module over 40 functions or 1000 lines is baselined at or below its recorded values
PASS: llm_parse_chokepoint — every json.loads site is the chokepoint, a named permanent site, or within its transition allowance
PASS: no_print_in_src — every print() site under src/world_engine/ is within its transition allowance
PASS: no canon write outside a sanctioned site
